3116010.name: Twitch Integrated Throwing System
3116010.description:
The Twitch Integrated Throwing System is the ultimate tool for streamers looking to add a touch of fun, engagement, and hilarity to their broadcasts. Perfectly designed for VTubers using VTube Studio or VSeeFace, and equally enjoyable for streamers with facecams, this software acts as a dynamic overlay that turns ordinary streams into extraordinary experiences.

Key Features:

🎯 Interactive Triggers
Set up reactions to your Twitch events! Customize what happens when viewers donate, follow, subscribe, or cheer – from throwing virtual objects to triggering animations. Watch as digital pies, plushies, or even random 3D items fly your way in real-time!

🎨 Built-in Asset Importer
Unleash your creativity! Easily import your favorite:

  • Sound Effects

  • 3D Models

  • PNGs & GIFs

  • VRM Avatars
    Create a fully immersive and interactive overlay with assets that reflect your unique streaming style.

📺 Versatile Compatibility
Whether you're a VTuber or a traditional facecam streamer, the Twitch Integrated Throwing System adapts to your setup, making it a versatile addition to any Twitch stream.

💡 Customizable & Easy-to-Use
Quickly configure triggers, adjust settings, and manage your assets with an intuitive interface that makes enhancing your stream simple and stress-free.
